required_preferences.fact: Calls her parents multiple times a week to coordinate post-surgery support and discuss her mother's recovery; texting becomes secondary during this period

supersedes.fact: Texts her parents every Sunday evening to check in — avoids long phone calls unless it's a special occasion

required_preferences.fact: Switched from crocheting to coloring or simple puzzle books while listening to podcasts — avoids all activities requiring two-handed dexterity until cast is removed

supersedes.fact: Crochets small projects while listening to podcasts — never watches TV at the same time

required_preferences.fact: Commutes to the office three days a week via light rail — always listens to tech podcasts during transit instead of music or audiobooks
Sticks to a fully vegetarian diet at home — refuses to cook meat even for guests
Cleans and checks her CPAP mask nightly as part of her pre-bed routine to prevent discomfort and ensure machine effectiveness.
Attends every virtual therapy session without rescheduling — considers these appointments non-negotiable

persona: A junior web developer at a nonprofit organization
